import sys, json
for line in sys.stdin:
    line=line.strip()
    if not line: continue
    r=json.loads(line)
    print(r.get('case_id'), '|', (r.get('caption') or '')[:70], '|', r.get('disposition'), '|', r.get('decided_at') or r.get('date_terminated'), '|', r.get('era'))
"; cat query_err.txt
